prompt: Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department

inputData.question: Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department"},"startedAt":1771803923132,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Compute department-level averages by joining grades → enrollments → course_sections → courses → departments, using FILTER to ignore NULL scores and providing a diff and categorical comparison. Results ordered deterministically by department_name.","sql":"WITH dept_scores AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    AVG(gr.exam_score) FILTER (WHERE gr.exam_score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_exam_score,
    AVG(gr.project_score) FILTER (WHERE gr.project_score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_project_score,
    COUNT(gr.id) FILTER (WHERE gr.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR gr.project_score IS NOT NULL) AS score_count
  FROM public.grades gr
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.id = gr.enrollment_id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.id = cs.course_id
  JOIN public.departments d ON d.id = c.department_id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  ROUND(avg_exam_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(avg_project_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND((avg_exam_score - avg_project_score)::numeric, 2) AS exam_minus_project_diff,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_exam_score IS NULL AND avg_project_score IS NULL THEN 'no_scores'
    WHEN avg_exam_score > avg_project_score THEN 'exam_higher'
    WHEN avg_exam_score < avg_project_score THEN 'project_higher'
    ELSE 'equal'
  END AS exam_vs_project,
  score_count
FROM dept_scores
ORDER BY department_name ASC;","assumptions":["All required tables/columns exist in the public schema as discovered (public.grades.enrollment_id, public.grades.exam_score, public.grades.project_score, public.enrollments.course_section_id, public.course_sections.course_id, public.courses.department_id, public.departments.id/name).","Exam and project scores use the same scale (so averages are directly comparable).","Departments with no non-null exam/project scores will appear with NULL averages and are labeled 'no_scores'."]},"endedAt":1771803972341},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH dept_scores AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    AVG(gr.exam_score) FILTER (WHERE gr.exam_score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_exam_score,
    AVG(gr.project_score) FILTER (WHERE gr.project_score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_project_score,
    COUNT(gr.id) FILTER (WHERE gr.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR gr.project_score IS NOT NULL) AS score_count
  FROM public.grades gr
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.id = gr.enrollment_id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.id = cs.course_id
  JOIN public.departments d ON d.id = c.department_id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  ROUND(avg_exam_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(avg_project_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND((avg_exam_score - avg_project_score)::numeric, 2) AS exam_minus_project_diff,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_exam_score IS NULL AND avg_project_score IS NULL THEN 'no_scores'
    WHEN avg_exam_score > avg_project_score THEN 'exam_higher'
    WHEN avg_exam_score < avg_project_score THEN 'project_higher'
    ELSE 'equal'
  END AS exam_vs_project,
  score_count
FROM dept_scores
ORDER BY department_name ASC;"},"startedAt":1771803972344,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"WITH dept_scores AS (

field."]}},"endedAt":1771804009482}},"input":{"question":"Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department"},"result":{"sql":"WITH dept_scores AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,

    AVG(gr.project_score) FILTER (WHERE gr.project_score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_project_score,

  JOIN public.departments d ON d.id = c.department_id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  ROUND(avg_exam_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(avg_project_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND((avg_exam_score - avg_project_score)::numeric, 2) AS exam_minus_project_diff,

    WHEN avg_exam_score < avg_project_score THEN 'project_higher'

  END AS exam_vs_project,
  score_count
FROM dept_scores

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Exam vs Project Scores by Department

resultRaw.sql:
WITH dept_scores AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    AVG(gr.exam_score) FILTER (WHERE gr.exam_score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_exam_score,
    AVG(gr.project_score) FILTER (WHERE gr.project_score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_project_score,
    COUNT(gr.id) FILTER (WHERE gr.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR gr.project_score IS NOT NULL) AS score_count
  FROM public.grades gr
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.id = gr.enrollment_id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.id = cs.course_id
  JOIN public.departments d ON d.id = c.department_id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  ROUND(avg_exam_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(avg_project_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND((avg_exam_score - avg_project_score)::numeric, 2) AS exam_minus_project_diff,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_exam_score IS NULL AND avg_project_score IS NULL THEN 'no_scores'
    WHEN avg_exam_score > avg_project_score THEN 'exam_higher'
    WHEN avg_exam_score < avg_project_score THEN 'project_higher'
    ELSE 'equal'
  END AS exam_vs_project,
  score_count
FROM dept_scores
ORDER BY department_name ASC;

result.sql:
WITH dept_scores AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    AVG(gr.exam_score) FILTER (WHERE gr.exam_score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_exam_score,
    AVG(gr.project_score) FILTER (WHERE gr.project_score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_project_score,
    COUNT(gr.id) FILTER (WHERE gr.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR gr.project_score IS NOT NULL) AS score_count
  FROM public.grades gr
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.id = gr.enrollment_id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.id = cs.course_id
  JOIN public.departments d ON d.id = c.department_id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  ROUND(avg_exam_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(avg_project_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND((avg_exam_score - avg_project_score)::numeric, 2) AS exam_minus_project_diff,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_exam_score IS NULL AND avg_project_score IS NULL THEN 'no_scores'
    WHEN avg_exam_score > avg_project_score THEN 'exam_higher'
    WHEN avg_exam_score < avg_project_score THEN 'project_higher'
    ELSE 'equal'
  END AS exam_vs_project,
  score_count
FROM dept_scores
ORDER BY department_name ASC;
